title: Distribution
description:
Parameters controlling the initial scatter of the feature.

Properties:
• iterations (int) = 1
• scatter_chance (float) = 1
• coordinate_eval_order (enum) = xzy
• x (int) = 0
• y (int) = 0
• z (int) = 0

iterations.title: Iterations
iterations.description: Number of scattered positions to generate. Can be an integer or a Molang expression.

scatter_chance.title: Scatter Chance
scatter_chance.description: Probability that this scatter will occur (0.0 to 1.0 or Molang expression). If not triggered, no iterations will run.

coordinate_eval_order.title: Coordinate Evaluation Order
coordinate_eval_order.description: The order in which coordinates will be evaluated. Should be used when a coordinate depends on another. Defaults to 'xzy'.

x.title: X Distribution
x.description: Distribution for the X coordinate (evaluated each iteration). Can be an integer, range object, or Molang expression.

y.title: Y Distribution
y.description: Distribution for the Y coordinate (evaluated each iteration). Can be an integer, range object, or Molang expression.

z.title: Z Distribution
z.description: Distribution for the Z coordinate (evaluated each iteration). Can be an integer, range object, or Molang expression.

defaultSnippets.label: Distribution
defaultSnippets.description: Controls the scatter distribution of features during world generation.
